scopeReview.command: Read AGENT.md, docs/agent-rules.json, docs/agent-feedback.md, docs/user/design-harness-workflow.md, docs/decisions.md, the stage-1 source-of-truth plan, builder prompt, current API routes/services/tests, git status, and recent commits.
scopeReview.summary: Confirmed that client clubId reached membership, match, schedule, records, feed, comment, notification, public-club, and club-admin services. Stage 1 canonicalized it at every API boundary, added canonical team APIs, and removed team creation Backend code without touching Frontend-owned files.

harnessValidate.summary: Harness structure, project rules, documentation policy, and reusable harness purity checks passed.

backendStatic.command: npm run typecheck && npx eslint src/app/api src/config/server-team.ts src/services/account-membership.ts src/services/club-admin.ts src/services/public-clubs.ts src/services/supabase-repositories.ts scripts/with-local-supabase-env.mjs tests/account-membership-flows.test.ts tests/club-admin-service.test.ts tests/local-supabase-api.test.ts tests/public-clubs-service.test.ts tests/server-team.test.ts tests/single-team-api-contract.test.ts --quiet
backendStatic.summary: TypeScript and every changed Backend/API/test file passed. Full-project lint remains blocked only by pre-existing Frontend-owned errors.

backendTests.command: npx vitest run tests/server-team.test.ts tests/single-team-api-contract.test.ts tests/public-clubs-service.test.ts tests/club-admin-service.test.ts tests/account-membership-flows.test.ts --reporter=dot
backendTests.summary: Five Backend test files passed with 41 tests, including server TeamContext, removed creation entrypoints, canonical public team, admin permissions, and membership flows.

localSupabase.summary: Local database reset, seven QA Auth users, demo seed, and 17 real API integration tests passed. Foreign Lynx and Orca clubId inputs did not change the FC Guppy data scope.

dbContract.summary: All 26 tracked Supabase SQL contract files passed the repository contract check.

browserRuntime.provider: npm run dev, in-app browser, server terminal log
browserRuntime.command: npm run dev; open http://localhost:3000/; refresh stale Local Supabase QA session; reload authenticated home
browserRuntime.summary: Dev server started, the first screen rendered, and a refreshed QA session loaded the FC Guppy home. Browser console had no new errors after session refresh, and server log showed successful membership, notifications, matches, schedule-polls, and announcements API responses.

fullSuite.summary: Backend and non-Frontend suites passed (22 files); tests/frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx still has 23 pre-existing UI expectation failures and 2 unhandled GuestDashboard errors.

standardGuard.summary: Harness validation, token sync, design guard, and diff ownership passed after temporarily isolating the preserved user .swp file. projectVerify stopped at 15 pre-existing lint errors in Frontend-owned components.

issuesObserved: The server previously trusted client clubId throughout all feature API routes.
The current Frontend still owns dead team-creation and multi-club state while the Backend capability has now been removed.
A Local Supabase reset invalidated the existing browser refresh token; re-authentication restored a clean runtime with no new console or server errors.
missedEvidence: The mandatory standard guard cannot pass until Frontend-owned lint and frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx failures are corrected by the Frontend team.
retrospective.reason: No reusable Harness-process improvement is proposed for this product-specific Backend contract migration.

blockers: npm run harness:guard:standard is blocked by 15 pre-existing lint errors in Frontend-owned DesktopLiveScreen, CommunityPage, LockerRoomTab, and RecordsTab files.
npm test is blocked by 23 failures and 2 unhandled errors in tests/frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx; Backend and Local Supabase tests pass.
nextActions: Frontend Engineer removes dead team creation/browse/switch state and updates frontend-auth-and-schedule-ui.test.tsx to the single-team contract.
Frontend Engineer resolves the 15 current lint errors without changing the Backend API contract.
Rerun npm run harness:guard:standard after the Frontend-owned blockers are resolved.
